title: Incorrect code generation for traced array of packed struct

features.name: traced array of packed struct with multidim array
features.description: Code should include a packed struct containing a multi-dimensional array, instantiated as a localparam array, with tracing enabled

features.name: packed struct with unpacked array of struct
features.description: Code should include a packed struct containing a multi-dimensional array used as element type of an unpacked array localparam
features.snippet:
typedef struct packed { logic [2:0][31:0] a; } t;
localparam t v[2:0];
